description: Tests for updated prd.ingested event type with nullable path and required content field, and new task.dependency.set and task.unblocked event types
steps_to_verify: Test that prd.ingested event accepts path as string | null
Test that prd.ingested event requires content as string
Test that task.dependency.set event accepts task_id and depends_on array
Test that task.unblocked event accepts task_id

description: Tests for ingestPrd accepting content directly and populating content in event payload for both input modes
steps_to_verify: Test ingestPrd with { content: string } skips readFileSync and uses content directly
Test ingestPrd with { path: string } reads file and populates content in event payload
Test prd.ingested event has path: null when content mode is used
Test size_bytes, lines, and content_hash are computed from resolved content in both modes

description: Tests for prdIngestBody schema accepting discriminated union of path or content
steps_to_verify: Test POST /api/commands/prd/ingest with { path: string } is accepted
Test POST /api/commands/prd/ingest with { content: string } is accepted
Test POST with both path and content is rejected
Test POST with neither path nor content is rejected

description: Tests for dependency validation, cycle detection, blocking logic, and unblocking on merge
steps_to_verify: Test topological sort detects circular dependencies and strips offending edges
Test task with unmet dependencies has blocked: true in projection
Test task.merged event on a dependency triggers task.unblocked for dependents when all deps satisfied
Test task.merged on one of multiple dependencies does not unblock if others remain
Test dependencies cannot be added to tasks that are in_progress or beyond
Test cancelled/failed dependency keeps dependents blocked and raises a warning

description: Update shared/events.ts: make prd.ingested path nullable, add required content field. Add new event types task.dependency.set and task.unblocked
steps_to_verify: prd.ingested type has path: string | null
prd.ingested type has content: string
task.dependency.set type exists with task_id and depends_on fields
task.unblocked type exists with task_id field

description: Update ingestPrd() in server/ingest.ts to accept { path: string } | { content: string }, skip readFileSync for content mode, always populate content in prd.ingested event payload
steps_to_verify: ingestPrd accepts { content: string } and uses it directly without file I/O
ingestPrd accepts { path: string } and reads file, populating content from resolved text
prd.ingested event always contains full content regardless of input mode
prd.ingested event has path: null when content is provided directly

description: Update prdIngestBody Zod schema in server/routes/commands.ts to accept { path: string } | { content: string } discriminated union
steps_to_verify: Schema validates { path: string } as valid
Schema validates { content: string } as valid
Schema rejects payloads with both path and content
Schema rejects payloads with neither path nor content

description: Update ingest prompt to have the LLM output depends_on references between draft tasks using temporary DT-* IDs, and remap to ULIDs server-side
steps_to_verify: Ingest prompt instructs LLM to assign DT-* IDs to draft tasks
Ingest prompt instructs LLM to output depends_on arrays referencing DT-* IDs
Server remaps DT-* IDs to ULIDs in the same pass as proposition ID remapping

description: Implement topological sort validation on extracted draft tasks. Strip cycle-causing edges and raise advisory pushback when cycles are detected
steps_to_verify: Topological sort runs on draft_tasks after extraction
Cycle-causing edges are removed from depends_on arrays
Advisory pushback is raised explaining which dependency edges were stripped
Valid dependency graphs pass through unchanged

description: Update proj_task_list projection to include depends_on (JSON array) and blocked (boolean) columns. Projection reacts to task.dependency.set, task.merged, and task.unblocked events
steps_to_verify: proj_task_list has depends_on column storing JSON array of task IDs
proj_task_list has blocked column computed from dependency status
task.dependency.set event updates depends_on for the target task
task.merged event recalculates blocked status for all tasks depending on the merged task
task.unblocked event sets blocked to false for the target task

description: Phase runner skips blocked tasks — checks depends_on before starting execution, only runs tasks whose dependencies have all reached merged status
steps_to_verify: Phase runner skips tasks where blocked is true
Phase runner starts tasks where all dependencies are merged
When a dependency fails/is cancelled, dependent tasks remain blocked and a warning event is emitted

description: Replace side-by-side inputs with Base UI Tabs component. Two tabs: 'File Path' (default) and 'Paste Content'. Values preserved across tab switches. Only active tab's value submitted
steps_to_verify: Base UI Tabs renders with 'File Path' as default active tab
File Path tab contains text input for path
Paste Content tab contains textarea for PRD markdown
Switching tabs preserves input values in both tabs
Ingest button is disabled when active tab's field is empty
File Path tab submits { path: string }
Paste Content tab submits { content: string }

description: Show dependency state on task cards: lock icon and 'Blocked by T-XXXXX' badge for blocked tasks with greyed-out styling. Show warning when blocked by a failed/cancelled dependency
steps_to_verify: Blocked tasks display lock icon and greyed-out styling
Blocked tasks show 'Blocked by T-XXXXX' with direct dependency IDs only
Warning indicator appears when a dependency is in failed/cancelled state
Unblocked tasks render normally with no dependency indicators

description: Allow users to add/remove dependencies on tasks that haven't started yet. Prevent edits on in_progress or later tasks. Prevent cycles in the UI
steps_to_verify: Dependency picker is available on task cards with status before in_progress
Dependency picker is disabled/hidden on in_progress or later tasks
Adding a dependency that would create a cycle is prevented with a user-facing message
Removing a dependency updates the task card immediately
Changes emit task.dependency.set events
